channel.title: imdunndrawing TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from imdunndrawing

item.title: One of my favorite reactions! 😂😂 #ca#caricaturea#fashiontoku#runwaya#damiondunn
item.description: One of my favorite reactions! 😂😂 #ca#caricaturea#fashiontoku#runwaya#damiondunn
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: This guy is one of the sweetest people I’ve ever had sit for me! I drew him years ago, but I forgot to sign it. So he hunted me down got me to sign the picture and on a whim, he decided to get another drawing. I was determined to make it better than the l
item.description: This guy is one of the sweetest people I’ve ever had sit for me! I drew him years ago, but I forgot to sign it. So he hunted me down got me to sign the picture and on a whim, he decided to get another drawing. I was determined to make it better than the l
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: Quick announcement! Today is my OFFICIAL first day at Universal Studios Orlando! 🦖 I’ll be working inside the park for a short while, so if you’re in the area, or planning a visit… keep your prehistoric peepers open and come find me! I’d LOVE to draw you
item.description: Quick announcement! Today is my OFFICIAL first day at Universal Studios Orlando! 🦖 I’ll be working inside the park for a short while, so if you’re in the area, or planning a visit… keep your prehistoric peepers open and come find me! I’d LOVE to draw you
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: This is Jonathan, another caricature artist I met for the first time yesterday at Universal Studios. This drawing actually served a few purposes. First, I haven’t airbrushed in a while. Second..(and this will really resonate with artists) I normally draw
item.description: This is Jonathan, another caricature artist I met for the first time yesterday at Universal Studios. This drawing actually served a few purposes. First, I haven’t airbrushed in a while. Second..(and this will really resonate with artists) I normally draw
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: Another wonderful day airbrushing people at Universal Studios! I had a blast with these two. #HarryPotter #Hogwarts #damiondunn #Airbrush #Caricatures
item.description: Another wonderful day airbrushing people at Universal Studios! I had a blast with these two. #HarryPotter #Hogwarts #damiondunn #Airbrush #Caricatures
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: This was their second time getting a drawing from me! And their big fans of Lord of the rings… So 😊 #l#lordoftheringsC#Caricatured#damiondunn
item.description: This was their second time getting a drawing from me! And their big fans of Lord of the rings… So 😊 #l#lordoftheringsC#Caricatured#damiondunn
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: I LOVE drawing artists!!! Having fun working at universal studios #airbrush #Caricature #universalstudios
item.description: I LOVE drawing artists!!! Having fun working at universal studios #airbrush #Caricature #universalstudios
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: New year workout motivation 🤣 #Caricature #newyearsresolution #workout
item.description: New year workout motivation 🤣 #Caricature #newyearsresolution #workout
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: Since she caught me “mid-quest” on a fantasy-style piece, I decided to lean into that realm and suit her up as the heroic warrior she clearly is. Sword sharp, armor strong, legendary horse! 🤣 Judging by her reaction, it was the right move 🙂‍↕️. #Caricatu
item.description: Since she caught me “mid-quest” on a fantasy-style piece, I decided to lean into that realm and suit her up as the heroic warrior she clearly is. Sword sharp, armor strong, legendary horse! 🤣 Judging by her reaction, it was the right move 🙂‍↕️. #Caricatu
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: Here’s another amazing Caricature Artist known throughout the Caricatures community by the simple name… Ken. ##Caricature##damiondunn##funnydrawing
item.description: Here’s another amazing Caricature Artist known throughout the Caricatures community by the simple name… Ken. ##Caricature##damiondunn##funnydrawing
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: This was a SUPER fun family to draw!!! Also my last drawing of the night #marvel #comictok #movielover #damiondunn #Caricature
item.description: This was a SUPER fun family to draw!!! Also my last drawing of the night #marvel #comictok #movielover #damiondunn #Caricature
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: This may or may not come as a surprise to some of you, but I still haven’t fully watched One Piece. That’s not entirely true. I’ve seen a few episodes, but I’m definitely not 1,000 episodes deep like some of my close friends 😅. I’m currently about four ep
item.description: This may or may not come as a surprise to some of you, but I still haven’t fully watched One Piece. That’s not entirely true. I’ve seen a few episodes, but I’m definitely not 1,000 episodes deep like some of my close friends 😅. I’m currently about four ep
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: thank you guys SO MUCH for sitting for me, trusting me with your faces, and letting me do my thing! I appreciate it more than you know! ##beachvibes #gymmotivation #airbrush #caricature
item.description: thank you guys SO MUCH for sitting for me, trusting me with your faces, and letting me do my thing! I appreciate it more than you know! ##beachvibes #gymmotivation #airbrush #caricature
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: He mentioned his favorite character was Iron Man. So I surprised him with this #marvel #ironman #comics #caricature #damiondunn
item.description: He mentioned his favorite character was Iron Man. So I surprised him with this #marvel #ironman #comics #caricature #damiondunn
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: Another day, drawing another #airbrush #caricature #artist the real mother of #dragon
item.description: Another day, drawing another #airbrush #caricature #artist the real mother of #dragon
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: Full disclosure: I’ve never had a beer, or been drunk. but when it comes to funny drawings, the answer WAS at the bottom of the glass 😅. They both said they drink often, so this scene popped into my head. I tried throwing them off with fake themes, but I
item.description: Full disclosure: I’ve never had a beer, or been drunk. but when it comes to funny drawings, the answer WAS at the bottom of the glass 😅. They both said they drink often, so this scene popped into my head. I tried throwing them off with fake themes, but I
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: 42 years of marriage! I’m glad they sat for me! Super sweet couple. #caricature #cute #sweet #aniversary
item.description: 42 years of marriage! I’m glad they sat for me! Super sweet couple. #caricature #cute #sweet #aniversary
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: I LOVE when people ask to be drawn FUNNY!!! I had a BLAST 🤘🏾😂🤘🏾 #caricature #baseball #sports #blooper😂
item.description: I LOVE when people ask to be drawn FUNNY!!! I had a BLAST 🤘🏾😂🤘🏾 #caricature #baseball #sports #blooper😂
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: I draw this couple almost every year. This time i want to give them something… out of this world 😅 #moon #nasa #spacex #caricature
item.description: I draw this couple almost every year. This time i want to give them something… out of this world 😅 #moon #nasa #spacex #caricature
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: When someone gets drawn twice in one day… you know the vibes hit different. While I was in the middle of another drawing, I felt this vessel of personality walking by 🤣. She had already gotten a caricature that day, but liked my style enough to get anothe
item.description: When someone gets drawn twice in one day… you know the vibes hit different. While I was in the middle of another drawing, I felt this vessel of personality walking by 🤣. She had already gotten a caricature that day, but liked my style enough to get anothe
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: She got a cute drawing earlier, and she wanted me to do a super exaggerated, borderline disrespectful one! I was happy to oblige #tampa #caricature #shocked #damiondunn
item.description: She got a cute drawing earlier, and she wanted me to do a super exaggerated, borderline disrespectful one! I was happy to oblige #tampa #caricature #shocked #damiondunn
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: I got to draw some pups, and two loving dog parents! Unfortunately, one of their furry pets passed away but made a cameo anyway. 😇🪽 I absolutely love her reaction. when I asked them to show photos of their dogs for the reveal, his thumb accidentally sw
item.description: I got to draw some pups, and two loving dog parents! Unfortunately, one of their furry pets passed away but made a cameo anyway. 😇🪽 I absolutely love her reaction. when I asked them to show photos of their dogs for the reveal, his thumb accidentally sw
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: When Prince meets A Black Panther… you don’t sketch it halfway… you go ALL IN. 🎨 While I was at the Florida State Fair in Tampa, I had the immense pleasure of drawing Justin in full color for the first time. I’d sketched him before, but there wasn’t enoug
item.description: When Prince meets A Black Panther… you don’t sketch it halfway… you go ALL IN. 🎨 While I was at the Florida State Fair in Tampa, I had the immense pleasure of drawing Justin in full color for the first time. I’d sketched him before, but there wasn’t enoug
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: They said they love bodyboarding… but in my chair, nobody’s board. 😏😂 I drew a LOT of repeat customers at this fair, so it was refreshing to have some newcomers who had no idea what they were getting into 😂. The moment they sat down, I knew I was about to
item.description: They said they love bodyboarding… but in my chair, nobody’s board. 😏😂 I drew a LOT of repeat customers at this fair, so it was refreshing to have some newcomers who had no idea what they were getting into 😂. The moment they sat down, I knew I was about to
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: When your client looks like Chris Brown AND just left his concert… you only have one option. 😅 This was actually my second time drawing this awesome couple! The first time, I had them on the basketball court, him “tossing her” the perfect “ass”ist for a m
item.description: When your client looks like Chris Brown AND just left his concert… you only have one option. 😅 This was actually my second time drawing this awesome couple! The first time, I had them on the basketball court, him “tossing her” the perfect “ass”ist for a m
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: She may be pocket-sized… but her personality stomps cities. 😂 I present to you the smallest big person I know… Kim a.k.a. the Godzilla of personality. A walking explosion of crystal confetti. In the character community, she’s basically the Kaiju of Trinke
item.description: She may be pocket-sized… but her personality stomps cities. 😂 I present to you the smallest big person I know… Kim a.k.a. the Godzilla of personality. A walking explosion of crystal confetti. In the character community, she’s basically the Kaiju of Trinke
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: Just another awesome couple getting a #caricature for the second time. #cute #fitness
item.description: Just another awesome couple getting a #caricature for the second time. #cute #fitness
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: Just an awesome couple enjoying their day at the #fair eating weird #food and getting a #caricature
item.description: Just an awesome couple enjoying their day at the #fair eating weird #food and getting a #caricature
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: I had an amazing time at the Strawberry festival! A big thank you to everyone who stopped by and got a drawing. ##cute##caricature##strawberryfestival
item.description: I had an amazing time at the Strawberry festival! A big thank you to everyone who stopped by and got a drawing. ##cute##caricature##strawberryfestival
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: She said her hobby was baking… so I put her BUNS in the oven. 🍑🔥 She’d been following my work for a while and finally tracked me down at the fair for her first caricature. The whole time she had NO idea what I was drawing… and I definitely didn’t calm her
item.description: She said her hobby was baking… so I put her BUNS in the oven. 🍑🔥 She’d been following my work for a while and finally tracked me down at the fair for her first caricature. The whole time she had NO idea what I was drawing… and I definitely didn’t calm her
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: Lol they turned for me before I started. And well. #reveal #reactions #caricature #foryou #funny #funnydrawing #cartoon #artiktok #drawing
item.description: Lol they turned for me before I started. And well. #reveal #reactions #caricature #foryou #funny #funnydrawing #cartoon #artiktok #drawing
item.author: imdunndrawing

item.title: So this was the last drawing of the night. And they just so happen to make my night. Full of life, great movie recommendations, and the smell of cheese and pepperoni. I immediately liked them both. Theme: taking a while guess he worked at Domino’s, and sh
item.description: So this was the last drawing of the night. And they just so happen to make my night. Full of life, great movie recommendations, and the smell of cheese and pepperoni. I immediately liked them both. Theme: taking a while guess he worked at Domino’s, and sh
item.author: imdunndrawing
